name: AVERA MCKENNAN HOSPITAL
notes: Avera McKennan Hospital & University Health Center, Sioux Falls SD. Part of the Avera Health system.

name: BROWNSVILLE ISD
notes: Brownsville Independent School District, Texas. Large urban ISD.

name: STOLT-NIELSEN USA INC
notes: US subsidiary of Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Stock Exchange listed), bulk liquid tanker and logistics company.

name: Faegre Baker Daniels LLP
notes: Merged with Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP in 2020 to become Faegre Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP. Website redirects to faegredrinker.com.

name: Alpine Access
notes: Alpine Access was acquired by SYNNEX (later Concentrix) around 2012. No longer exists as independent entity; website gone.

name: National Labor Relations Board
notes: Federal independent agency. nlrb.gov is the correct official website — stored value is correct.

name: Oregon Department of Corrections
notes: Stored value is oregon.gov (parent domain). Correct URL is oregon.gov/doc.

name: Startup (in Stealth Mode)
notes: Stealth-mode startup with LinkedIn as stored website. No public website exists. Size of 5K-10K is suspicious for a stealth startup — ground truth omits size as unreliable.

name: WHATABRANDS LLC
notes: Whatabrands LLC is the parent holding company of Whataburger. San Antonio TX.

name: BOEING COMMERCIAL SPACE COMPANY
notes: Division of Boeing focused on commercial satellite launch. Website rolls up to boeing.com. Size of 501-1K refers to this division only.

name: NORTH HAVEN SCHOOL DISTRICT
notes: Connecticut school district. Website already in database — pipeline should confirm it.

name: Car Source Collision Center
notes: Auto body/collision repair shop in Gaithersburg MD. Website already in database.

name: Barbounia Restaurant NYC
notes: Mediterranean restaurant at 250 Park Ave South, Manhattan.

name: HAYS CONSOLIDATED I S D
notes: Hays Consolidated ISD, Kyle TX. Size in DB (51-200) is almost certainly wrong for this ISD — omitting size from ground truth.

name: MERCY HOSPITAL CADILLAC
notes: Part of Trinity Health system. Website uncertain (may have closed or merged URL). Omitting website from ground truth.

name: Office of Governor Josh Shapiro
notes: Stored value is pa.gov (parent domain). Correct URL is governor.pa.gov.

name: Hoboken Hospitality
notes: Stored value is facebook.com. Actual website unknown — omitting from ground truth. Segment and industry are classifiable from name.

name: CLIENTELE, INC.
notes: Clientele is a US skincare brand. Website already in database.

name: KASS SHULER, P.A.
notes: Florida law firm specializing in civil/family litigation. Website already in database.

name: WILLAMETTE ESD SCHOOL DISTRICT
notes: Willamette Education Service District, Salem OR. Regional ESD serving multiple school districts.
